scripts.stack:up: docker compose -f ../docker-compose.yml -f ../docker-compose.e2e.yml up -d --wait db && docker compose -f ../docker-compose.yml -f ../docker-compose.e2e.yml exec -T db psql -U postgres -c "SELECT 'CREATE DATABASE rs_e2e' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT FROM pg_database WHERE datname = 'rs_e2e')\gexec" && docker compose -f ../docker-compose.yml -f ../docker-compose.e2e.yml up -d --wait app web mailpit stub
